name: Chrome Blobs (Liquid Metal)
description: Reproducible twin of create_chrome_blobs: an animated noise field is blurred, gamma-lifted, thresholded into metaballs and re-softened, then a GLSL TOP fakes a chrome environment reflection (Sobel normal + procedural studio env + moving specular) over a gradient background — the classic liquid-metal look. The blob field animates offline via absTime expressions on the noiseTOP; the metal color (silver) and gradient background are baked into the shader. uTime is a uniform: after import bind it to absTime.seconds to move the reflections (manual-wire — RecipeSchema uniforms take constants only). Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: noise1
nodes.comment: Animated blob field. tx/tz are driven by absTime expressions so it moves offline.

nodes.name: blur1
nodes.comment: Soften the field so the metaballs merge smoothly.

nodes.name: level1
nodes.comment: Lift the field toward the threshold.

nodes.name: threshold1
nodes.comment: Cut the field into metaball shapes.

nodes.name: blur2
nodes.comment: Re-soften the hard threshold edges so the Sobel normal reads smooth.

nodes.name: glsl_chrome
nodes.comment: Fakes a chrome env-map reflection from the blob field; uTime uniform via the Vectors sequence.

parameters.name: field_drift_x
parameters.description: Drifts the blob field horizontally so the metal flows offline.

parameters.name: field_drift_z
parameters.description: Drifts the blob field in depth for evolving shapes.

glsl_uniforms.name: uTime
glsl_uniforms.label: Time
glsl_uniforms.description: Reflection animation phase. After import set this uniform's value expression to absTime.seconds to move the chrome highlights (manual-wire — schema takes constants only).

preview_description: Blobby metaballs rendered as flowing liquid silver chrome, reflecting a procedural studio environment with a bright moving specular, set against a soft blue-grey gradient.
